events.title: ICE agent charged in Minneapolis shooting is arrested in Texas
events.summary: Christian Castro was taken into custody on charges of assault and falsely reporting a crime in connection with the Jan. shooting in Minneapolis of Julio Sosa-Celis during an attempted immigration arrest.

events.title: Louisiana passes new congressional map, dismantling one majority-Black district
events.summary: Louisiana Republicans approved a new congressional map Friday, eliminating one of the state’s two majority-Black districts and drawing an additional Republican-leaning district in its place

events.title: Drag queen Pattie Gonia asks apparel company Patagonia to drop trademark infringement lawsuit
events.summary: Drag queen and environmentalist Pattie Gonia asked the outdoor apparel company Patagonia to drop its trademark infringement lawsuit, saying it could lead to the erasure of the activist’s name and advocacy.

events.title: Texas roller coaster malfunction leaves riders stranded 100 feet in the air for hours
events.summary: Eight riders were stranded nearly 100 feet in the air on Thursday evening after a roller coaster in Texas stopped during its vertical climb.

events.title: Oil records its biggest one-month drop in six years, bringing consumers some relief
events.summary: The price of crude oil in May recorded its biggest one-month decline in six years, delivering some relief to consumers.

events.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses
events.summary: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

events.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?
events.summary: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

events.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer
events.summary: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

events.title: Flash sale: Get up to 65% off grill tools and more outdoor items at Walmart for a limited time
events.summary: Walmart’s Outdoor Flash Sale is here and has grill accessories, outdoor furniture, lawn appliances and more for up to 65 percent off.

events.title: Russia denounced after drone hits Romanian apartment building
events.summary: A Russian drone crashed into an apartment building in Romania early Friday, injuring two people and setting the building ablaze, exactly the type of spillover from the war in Ukraine that many in Europe have long feared

events.title: Iran may have used Chinese missile to shoot down U.S. fighter jet, sources say
events.summary: The F-15 fighter that was shot down over southwestern Iran last month and set off a dangerous rescue mission was probably struck by a Chinese-made shoulder-launched missile, sources say.

events.title: Why U.S. allies aren’t taking Trump seriously after his push for Arab-Israel normalization
events.summary: It was the kind of sweeping, last-minute demand that would have torpedoed most diplomatic talks: President Donald Trump insisting this week that in exchange for him ending the war with Iran, several Arab and Muslim countries should sign on to his Abraham Accords to normalize their diplomatic relations with Israel.

events.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
events.summary: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

events.title: Video shows first of five men trapped in Laos cave rescued
events.summary: The men from Laos have been trapped underground for over a week after entering a cave to look for gold. A team of rescuers is working to bring out all of the five so far located, although two others are still missing.

events.title: Four still remain trapped in the flooded Laos cave after one person was rescued
events.summary: Rescuers have begun removing miners who have been trapped in a flooded cave in Laos for more than a week. One person was rescued while four others remain trapped. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer reports on the rescue operation underway.

events.title: Hundreds of hikers summit Mt. Everest in record-smashing season
events.summary: Mt. Everest has seen hundreds of climbers this spring, with some even smashing world records. But the influx of visitors has some hikers and officials raising concerns about overcrowding. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist reports.

events.title: Sacrificial albino buffalo spared after Trump resemblance
events.summary: An albino buffalo has been nicknamed “Donald Trump” for its tuft of pale hair, a feature many say mirrors the president’s signature hairstyle. Due to its popularity, the government spared the buffalo from the Eid al-Adha sacrifice and instead moved it to the Bangladesh National Zoo.

events.title: From solar to charcoal, Cubans look for alternatives amid outages and fuel shortages
events.summary: Some Cubans who’ve been able to buy solar panels say it’s a game changer, but most rely on other alternatives including charcoal, despite health concerns and the steep cost.

events.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
events.summary: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

events.title: Tracking the Ebola outbreak: Where the deadly virus is spreading and how the U.S. is responding
events.summary: Learn more about the deadly 2026 Ebola outbreak, including how many cases there are so far, which countries are most affected, how this outbreak compares with others in severity and more.

events.title: Man rescued after more than a week trapped in flooded cave in Laos
events.summary: Rescuers have begun removing miners trapped in a flooded cave in Laos for more than a week, with video showing the efforts as they ran late into the night local time.

events.title: Americans who get Ebola will go to Europe for treatment, not U.S., officials say
events.summary: If additional Americans contract Ebola and need medical care, they will be sent to Europe rather than brought home to the U.S., senior administration officials said.

events.title: Iran and U.S. exchange new strikes as Trump dismisses pressure to end war
events.summary: Iran fired a missile at an American air base in Kuwait just hours after the U.S. attacked the Islamic Republic, with both sides accusing the other of violating their shaky ceasefire and further imperiling diplomatic efforts to end the war.

events.title: Buffalo named ‘Donald Trump’ for its blond comb-over is spared Eid sacrifice
events.summary: There’s the distinctive blond tuft, combed over.

events.title: U.S. dismisses claim its diplomats have fled Kyiv as Zelenskyy pens Trump letter
events.summary: The U.S. reiterated that its diplomats remained in Kyiv despite Russia’s escalating threats, dismissing the top E.U. diplomat’s suggestion that Washington had evacuated the Ukrainian capital.

events.title: Uganda’s Ghetto Kids will dance with Shakira at World Cup final halftime show

events.title: Five villagers stuck in a flooded cave for more than a week are found alive in Laos, rescuers say
events.summary: Five villagers stuck in a flooded cave in central Laos for more than a week were found alive, rescuers said Wednesday, but two others are missing.

events.title: Four years after World Cup drama, Gio Reyna gets another shot with Team USA
events.summary: Last week, Gio Reyna and his wife, Chloe, were sitting in a parking lot, outside a smoothie shop in Connecticut, waiting to hear if he’d made Team USA’s World Cup roster.

events.title: Dissident flees China by inflatable boat, hoping it’s 4th time lucky on escape attempts
events.summary: A Chinese dissident who fled the country aboard an inflatable boat has been detained in South Korea, with rights groups calling for him to be granted asylum after three previous escape attempts led to his being returned to China.

events.title: Russia pressures U.S., Ukraine’s allies to flee Kyiv, threatening ‘systematic strikes’
events.summary: The warning came just days after the Ukrainian capital faced one of the heaviest bombardments since the start of the Russian invasion.

events.title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire and threatens retaliation after new strikes
events.summary: Iran accused the United States on Tuesday of “a clear violation of the ceasefire” between the two countries after the U.S. launched what it called defensive strikes that threatened to disrupt intensifying talks to end the war

events.title: Gandalf, Picasso and MLK: Cultural references ground Pope Leo’s AI warning
events.summary: It took a little over a year for Pope Leo XIV to write more than 42,000 words of his first encyclical, which deals with safeguarding human dignity in the age of artificial intelligence.

events.title: ‘I’m from Miami,’ but ‘it’s hot’: Rubio talks Hormuz, trade and searing temperatures in India
events.summary: Summers in New Delhi can be brutal, even for Floridians used to the heat

events.title: Starbucks struggles to quell outrage over ‘Tank Day’ campaign that evoked massacre in South Korea
